Bakliwal Tutorials : VB Sir’s Webinar Reminder

Dear Student,

We would like to remind you of VB sir’s webinar tonight, where he will discuss the detailed Revision and Test Series planning. He will also cover a few points that will help you get in the right frame of mind for revision.

VB sir’s Webinar Date: 18th Nov 2025 (Tuesday)
Webinar Time:  7:00 pm to 9:00 pm 
Reporting time: 6:45 pm (A riddle will be discussed from 6:50 pm to 7:10 pm after which the session will begin)

Link to Join the Webinar: https://us06web.zoom.us/j/82052656850?pwd=ubX6ynwUNKao2KTwQhNJM8NDgAxgyb.1
Meeting ID: 820 5265 6850
Passcode: 552242

Please note that due to the participant limit on Zoom, only the first 1,000 students will be able to join the webinar there on a first-come, first-served basis. The rest of the students can attend the webinar via YouTube Live.

The YouTube link will be shared at around 6:30 pm on the same day on your Telegram channel.

Kindly attend this webinar (along with your parents) 'live' as per the schedule above, as the recording of this webinar will not be provided.

Best regards,
BT Team.
event_title: VB Sir's Webinar (Revision & Test Series Planning)

Reminder: C26 BTTS-03

Dear Students,

This is a gentle reminder that the C26 BTTS-03 Exam Scheduled on BT Portal.

Date: 19 November 2025

Paper 1: 9:00 am to 12:00 noon
Paper 2: 2:30 pm to 5:30 pm

Login Time Paper 1 : 9:00 am to 9:15 am
Login Time Paper 2 : 2:30 pm to 2:45 pm

If you try to log in after 9:15 am for Paper 1 and after 2:45 pm for Paper 2, the test will not be visible on the portal. We will not allot the test under any circumstances to students who log in after these times.
Please start your test within the given time frame only.

💻 ONLINE Mode:
Join the Zoom meeting at least 20 minutes before the exam, along with your parents, for invigilation purposes.

Click the link below to access the online test:
🔗 BT Online Test Portal: https://exams.bakliwaltutorialsiit.com/

We suggest you login well before the exam and check to avoid the last minute issue.

If your test is submitted or you face any issues, please contact your invigilator immediately to have your test reset.

❓ Login Issues:
If you face any problems with your username or password, reach out to us at:
📞 8888828145 / 8888840195

📧 academics@bakliwaltutorialsiit.com (Academics - BT Team)

Important Note:
The detailed video solutions along with the answer key will be shared on your Telegram channel after the completion of the BTest.

Wishing you all the very best for your Exam!

Warm Regards,
BT  Team
